subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This is a servant who hath been illumined by the radiant lights of guidance shining from the Sun of Truth, and who hath been irradiated by [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبد استشرق من انوار الهدایه الساطعه من شمس الحقیقه و استضاء من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @Manifestation of God as sun
